name: che-word-mcp
description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.13.9 bump ooxml-swift v0.19.8→v0.19.9 — A-CONT-3 mini-cycle of #58 closes 3 P0 from sub-stack A-CONT-2 6-AI verify INCLUDING SILENT CORRECTNESS REGRESSION（delete_bookmark for header/footer bookmarks was silently lost on disk in v3.13.8 — must-upgrade）。list_bookmarks now surfaces paragraph-level container bookmarks; insert_bookmark detects duplicate names across all 5 part types。Sub-cycle 4 for #58 (A → A-CONT → A-CONT-2 → A-CONT-3). Same convergence-cycle pattern as R5→R5-CONT-4 (5 sub-cycles for #56). v3.13.8 A-CONT-2 mini-mini-cycle; v3.13.7 A-CONT; v3.13.6 sub-stack A 初始 fix。B re-numbered to v3.13.10 / #59 whitespace overlay; C unchanged v3.14.0 / #60。基於 ooxml-swift v0.19.9。
